name: NetSuite ERP MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Oracle NetSuite ERP — enabling AI agents to interact with NetSuite's enterprise resource planning system. Allows agents to query and manage financial records, customer and vendor data, inventory, orders, and business processes in NetSuite via SuiteScript REST APIs.
use_cases: Querying NetSuite financial data and reports from enterprise finance agents
Managing sales orders and fulfillments in NetSuite from order management agents
Retrieving inventory levels and supply chain data from operations agents
Automating NetSuite data entry and record management from ERP workflow agents
not_for: Small businesses without NetSuite subscriptions (enterprise ERP pricing)
Real-time transaction processing at high volume
Non-NetSuite ERP systems (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, etc.)
best_when: An enterprise using NetSuite wants AI agents to query financial data, manage records, and automate ERP workflows — reducing manual NetSuite navigation for business processes.
avoid_when: You use other ERP systems. NetSuite is expensive enterprise software — the MCP is only useful if your organization already uses it. FINANCIAL RISK: Autonomous ERP modifications require strict governance.

auth.notes: NetSuite TBA (Token-Based Authentication) or OAuth 2.0. Create integration record in NetSuite Setup. Use role with minimal permissions for agent access.

pricing.paid_tiers: NetSuite pricing varies by module count and user count
pricing.notes: NetSuite is enterprise SaaS with significant cost. Community MCP server is free open source. Requires existing NetSuite subscription.

performance.rate_limits: NetSuite API: concurrency limits; 10 concurrent SuiteScript calls default

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: NetSuite ERP contains sensitive financial records — strict access control required
AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: NetSuite modifications affect production financial data with audit trail implications
NetSuite concurrency limits: multiple concurrent agent operations can trigger governance errors
SuiteScript API complexity: NetSuite has specific record types and field naming conventions
Community implementation — validate against your NetSuite version and enabled modules
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Enterprise ERP with financial records, customer data, and inventory. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY. Strict role-based access. TBA authentication. SOC1/2 certified.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise ERP with highly sensitive financial and business data. Role-based access critical. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY for write operations. SOC1/2 certified.
